description: Real capture (2026-07-09, SDK 0.3.206). Dead turn from a nonexistent model (claude-nonexistent-9). REAL SHAPE: result arrives with subtype:"success" but is_error:true, terminal_reason:"api_error", api_error_status:404, plus a synthetic assistant message with error:"model_not_found" and a command_lifecycle:cancelled frame for the dead command. Guards terminal_reason surfacing: the legacy subtype-only error check classifies this turn as SUCCESS and emits no session_error.
